typeProperties.script:
parameters{
	DATE_PERIOD as string (),
	LogId as integer (),
	pFMForecastDestDB_ConString as string (),
	pFMForecastLogDB_ConString as string ()
}

source(output(
		{} as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	query: 'SELECT Company = CONVERT(NVARCHAR(2), \'PL\')       ,[BOM No] 	  ,COALESCE (I.MINVL, \'UNKNOWN\') AS MINVL       ,[Description]       ,[BOM Unit of Measure Code]       ,[Version Code]       ,[Version Status]       ,[Creation Date]       ,[Last Date Modified]       ,B.[Line No]       ,B.[Item No]       ,[Item Description]       ,[Item Unit of Measure Code]       ,[Item Quantity] 	  ,(\'R\'+SUBSTRING(B.[Item No],2,4)) AS RCode       ,[Starting Date]       ,[Ending Date]       ,[BOM Inactive]       ,[BOM Quantity(Base)] 	  ,[Net Weight] 	  ,(case when [Net Weight]<>0 then ([Item Quantity]/[Net Weight]) else 0.0 end) AS BomWeight  FROM [Forecast].[dbo].[EDW Production BOM RNI] AS B LEFT OUTER JOIN [Forecast].[dbo].[EDW Product RNI] AS P 	ON B.[BOM No]=P.[No]  LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT A.MINOS, A.DESCRIP, A.MINVL FROM dbo.Item_MASTER A 					INNER JOIN ( SELECT MINOS, MAX(MINVL) AS MAXMINVL FROM dbo.Item_MASTER GROUP BY MINOS ) B 					ON A.MINOS = B.MINOS AND A.MINVL = B.MAXMINVL )  I  	ON B.[BOM No] = I.[MINOS] WHERE   B.[DATAAREAID]=\'NV1\' and   P.[DATAAREAID]=\'NV1\' and P.[Item Category] in (\'FG\', \'BIG BAG\', \'COMB ITEM\')  Group by B.[DATAAREAID]       ,[BOM No]       ,[Description]       ,I.[MINVL]       ,[BOM Unit of Measure Code]       ,[Version Code]       ,[Version Status]       ,[Creation Date]       ,[Last Date Modified]       ,B.[Line No]       ,B.[Item No]       ,[Item Description]       ,[Item Unit of Measure Code]       ,[Item Quantity]       ,[Starting Date]       ,[Ending Date]       ,[BOM Inactive]       ,[BOM Quantity(Base)] 	  ,[Net Weight] order by B.[Item No]',
	format: 'query',
	staged:false) ~> ProductionBomsRNI0	source(output(
		{} as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	query: 'WITH B0 AS (SELECT    (case when [BOM No] BETWEEN \'0\' and \'99999\' then left([BOM No],5)+\'0\' else [BOM No]  end)  [BOM No2]   ,*  FROM [dbo].[EDW Production BOM RCSAS]) , P as (select * from [dbo].[EDW Product RCSAS] AS P) , I  as(SELECT A.MINOS, max(A.DESCRIP) DESCRIP, max(A.MINVL) MINVL FROM dbo.Item_MASTER A group by A.MINOS)  , z as(SELECT (case when B.[DATAAREAID]=\'NV1\' then \'AIM\' when B.[DATAAREAID]=\'NV2\' then \'LRD\' else B.[DATAAREAID] end) AS Company       ,[BOM No2]   [BOM No]       ,COALESCE (I.MINVL, \'UNKNOWN\') AS MINVL       ,[Description]       ,[BOM Unit of Measure Code]       ,[Version Code]       ,[Version Status]       ,[Creation Date]       ,[Last Date Modified]       ,B.[Line No]       ,B.[Item No]       ,[Item Description]       ,[Item Unit of Measure Code]       ,[Item Quantity]       ,(\'R\'+SUBSTRING(B.[Item No],2,4)) AS RCode       ,[Starting Date]       ,[Ending Date]       ,[BOM Inactive]       ,[BOM Quantity(Base)]       ,[Net Weight]       ,(case when [Net Weight]<>0 then ([Item Quantity]/[Net Weight]) else 0.0 end) AS BomWeight     FROM B0 AS B LEFT OUTER JOIN [dbo].[EDW Product RCSAS] AS P 	ON B.[BOM No2]=P.[No] LEFT OUTER JOIN I  	ON B.[Bom No2] = I.[MINOS] WHERE  B.[DATAAREAID] in ((SELECT [GOLIVE_PARAMETER]  FROM [Forecast].[dbo].[RCSAS_1NAV_GOLIVE_SWITCH]), \'NV2\') AND  P.[Item Category] in (\'FG\', \'BIG BAG\', \'RECIPE\')   AND [BOM No] NOT LIKE \'X____\'   Group by B.[DATAAREAID]       ,[BOM No2]       ,I.MINVL       ,[Description]       ,[BOM Unit of Measure Code]       ,[Version Code]       ,[Version Status]       ,[Creation Date]       ,[Last Date Modified]       ,B.[Line No]       ,B.[Item No]       ,[Item Description]       ,[Item Unit of Measure Code]       ,[Item Quantity]       ,[Starting Date]       ,[Ending Date]       ,[BOM Inactive]       ,[BOM Quantity(Base)]       ,[Net Weight])  select * from z',
	format: 'query',
	staged:false) ~> ProductionBomsRCSASpostgolive
ProductionBomsRNI0 sink(input(
		Company as string,
		Description as string,
		Version_Status as integer,
		BOM_Inactive as boolean,
		Last_Date_Modified as timestamp 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		Item_Unit_of_Measure_Code as string,
		BOM_Quantity_Base_ as integer,
		BOM_Unit_of_Measure_Code as string,
		Item_Description as string,
		Version_Code as string,
		Line_No as integer,
		Starting_Date as timestamp 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		Ending_Date as timestamp 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		Item_Quantity as integer,
		Net_Weight as integer,
		Item_No as string,
		MINVL as string,
		Creation_Date as timestamp 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		RCode as string,
		BomWeight as integer,
		BOM_No as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	stagingSchemaName: 'dbo',
	saveOrder: 10000,
	insertable:true,
	deletable:false,
	upsertable:false,
	updateable:false,
	keys:[],
	mapColumn(
		Company,
		Description,
		Version_Status = {Version Status},
		BOM_Inactive = {BOM Inactive},
		Last_Date_Modified = {Last Date Modified},
		Item_Unit_of_Measure_Code = {Item Unit of Measure Code},
		BOM_Quantity_Base_ = {BOM Quantity(Base)},
		BOM_Unit_of_Measure_Code = {BOM Unit of Measure Code},
		Item_Description = {Item Description},
		Version_Code = {Version Code},
		Line_No = {Line No},
		Starting_Date = {Starting Date},
		Ending_Date = {Ending Date},
		Item_Quantity = {Item Quantity},
		Net_Weight = {Net Weight},
		Item_No = {Item No},
		MINVL,
		Creation_Date = {Creation Date},
		RCode,
		BomWeight,
		BOM_No = {BOM No})) ~> ProductionBomsRNI
ProductionBomsRCSASpostgolive sink(input(
		Company as string,
		Version_Status as integer,
		Description as string,
		BOM_Inactive as boolean,
		Last_Date_Modified as timestamp 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		Item_Unit_of_Measure_Code as string,
		BOM_Quantity_Base_ as integer,
		BOM_Unit_of_Measure_Code as string,
		Item_Description as string,
		Version_Code as string,
		Line_No as integer,
		Starting_Date as timestamp 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		Ending_Date as timestamp 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		Item_Quantity as integer,
		Net_Weight as integer,
		Item_No as string,
		MINVL as string,
		Creation_Date as timestamp 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		RCode as string,
		BomWeight as integer,
		BOM_No as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	stagingSchemaName: 'dbo',
	saveOrder: 10000,
	insertable:true,
	deletable:false,
	upsertable:false,
	updateable:false,
	keys:[],
	mapColumn(
		Company,
		Version_Status = {Version Status},
		Description,
		BOM_Inactive = {BOM Inactive},
		Last_Date_Modified = {Last Date Modified},
		Item_Unit_of_Measure_Code = {Item Unit of Measure Code},
		BOM_Quantity_Base_ = {BOM Quantity(Base)},
		BOM_Unit_of_Measure_Code = {BOM Unit of Measure Code},
		Item_Description = {Item Description},
		Version_Code = {Version Code},
		Line_No = {Line No},
		Starting_Date = {Starting Date},
		Ending_Date = {Ending Date},
		Item_Quantity = {Item Quantity},
		Net_Weight = {Net Weight},
		Item_No = {Item No},
		MINVL,
		Creation_Date = {Creation Date},
		RCode,
		BomWeight,
		BOM_No = {BOM No})) ~> ProductionBomsRCSAS
